infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travel Diary uses the camera to capture your travel memories.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Diary uses your location to tag travel entries with an address.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Travel Diary sends a notification when you save a new entry.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Travel Diary to access your camera.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Travel Diary to access your location.
